13 onboarding docs FINAL. VA trial active. 12 past-due projects.
Domain Agents v1 COMPLETE. MCP Apps + Admin CLI LIVE. 44 jobs, 17 skills.
Team at 10. Courtney onboarding. Ellen & Sheya incoming.
